_note: The launcher fetches this at runtime to resolve server addresses, so moving the servers (laptop -> Oracle -> playit) is a one-line edit here + git push, with NO new .exe. Values are playit.gg Minecraft-Java tunnel host:port (explicit port required -- Minecraft's --quickPlayMultiplayer does NOT do the SRV lookup a manually-added server entry would, so a bare hostname silently connects to the wrong default port 25565 and hangs). Update BOTH host and port together if a playit tunnel is ever recreated.
